23: # Pydantic models for type Chat Message validation
24: class Context(PydanticBaseModel):
25:     compiled: str
26:     file: str
27:     uri: Optional[str] = None
28:     query: Optional[str] = None
29: 
30:     @model_validator(mode="after")
31:     def set_uri_fallback(self):
32:         """Set the URI to existing deeplink URI. Fallback to file based URI if unset."""
33:         if self.uri and self.uri.strip():
34:             self.uri = self.uri
35:         elif self.file and (self.file.startswith("http") or self.file.startswith("file://")):
36:             self.uri = self.file
37:         elif self.file:
38:             self.uri = f"file://{self.file}"
39:         else:
40:             self.uri = None
41:         return self

339:     privacy_level = models.CharField(max_length=30, choices=PrivacyLevel.choices, default=PrivacyLevel.PRIVATE)
340:     is_hidden = models.BooleanField(default=False)
341: 
342:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
343:         is_new = self._state.adding
344: 
345:         if self.creator is None:
346:             self.managed_by_admin = True
347: 
348:         if is_new and not self.slug:
349:             random_sequence = "".join(choice("0123456789") for i in range(6))
350:             slug = f"{self.name.lower().replace(' ', '-')}-{random_sequence}"
351:             self.slug = slug
352: 
353:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
354: 
355:     def __str__(self):
356:         return self.name

359: class ProcessLock(DbBaseModel):
360:     class Operation(models.TextChoices):
361:         INDEX_CONTENT = "index_content"
362:         SCHEDULED_JOB = "scheduled_job"
363:         SCHEDULE_LEADER = "schedule_leader"
364:         APPLY_MIGRATIONS = "apply_migrations"
365: 
366:     # We need to make sure that some operations are thread-safe. To do so, add locks for potentially shared operations.
367:     # For example, we need to make sure that only one process is updating the embeddings at a time.
368:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=Operation.choices, unique=True)
369:     started_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
370:     max_duration_in_seconds = models.IntegerField(default=60 * 60 * 12)  # 12 hours
371:

373: @receiver(pre_save, sender=Agent)
374: def verify_agent(sender, instance, **kwargs):
375:     # check if this is a new instance
376:     if instance._state.adding:
377:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, privacy_level=Agent.PrivacyLevel.PUBLIC).exists():
378:             raise ValidationError(f"A public Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")
379:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, creator=instance.creator).exists():
380:             raise ValidationError(f"A private Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")

400: class WebScraper(DbBaseModel):
401:     class WebScraperType(models.TextChoices):
402:         FIRECRAWL = "Firecrawl"
403:         OLOSTEP = "Olostep"
404:         EXA = "Exa"
405:         DIRECT = "Direct"
406: 
407:     name = models.CharField(
408:         max_length=200,
409:         default=None,
410:         null=True,
411:         blank=True,
412:         unique=True,
413:         help_text="Friendly name. If not set, it will be set to the type of the scraper.",
414:     )
415:     type = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=WebScraperType.choices, default=WebScraperType.DIRECT)
416:     api_key = models.CharField(
417:         max_length=200,
418:         default=None,
419:         null=True,
420:         blank=True,
421:         help_text="API key of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service requires an API key. Default is set from env var.",
422:     )
423:     api_url = models.URLField(
424:         max_length=200,
425:         default=None,
426:         null=True,
427:         blank=True,
428:         help_text="API URL of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service on non-default URL.",
429:     )
430:     priority = models.IntegerField(
431:         default=None,
432:         null=True,
433:         blank=True,
434:         unique=True,
435:         help_text="Priority of the web scraper. Lower numbers run first.",
436:     )
437: 
438:     def clean(self):
439:         error = {}
440:         if self.name is None:
441:             self.name = self.type.capitalize()
442:         if self.api_url is None:
443:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
444:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_URL", "https://api.firecrawl.dev")
445:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
446:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_URL", "https://agent.olostep.com/olostep-p2p-incomingAPI")
447:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
448:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("EXA_API_URL", "https://api.exa.ai")
449:         if self.api_key is None:
450:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
451:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_KEY")
452:                 if not self.api_key and self.api_url == "https://api.firecrawl.dev":
453:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use default Firecrawl. Get API key from https://firecrawl.dev."
454:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
455:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_KEY")
456:                 if self.api_key is None:
457:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Olostep. Get API key from https://olostep.com/."
458:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
459:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("EXA_API_KEY")
460:                 if self.api_key is None:
461:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Exa. Get API key from https://exa.ai/."
462:         if error:
463:             raise ValidationError(error)
464: 
465:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
466:         self.clean()
467: 
468:         if self.priority is None:
469:             max_priority = WebScraper.objects.aggregate(models.Max("priority"))["priority__max"]
470:             self.priority = max_priority + 1 if max_priority else 1
471: 
472:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
473: 
474:     def __str__(self):
475:         return self.name

534:             error["chat_default"] = "Set the price tier of this chat model to free or use a free tier chat model."

540:             raise ValidationError(error)

557:         HUGGINGFACE = "huggingface"
558:         OPENAI = "openai"
559:         LOCAL = "local"
560: 
561:     # This is the model name exposed to users on their settings page
562:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="default")
563:     # Type of content the model can generate embeddings for
564:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.TEXT)
565:     # Bi-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
566:     bi_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="thenlper/gte-small")
567:     # Config passed to the sentence-transformer model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
568:     bi_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
569:     # Query encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
570:     bi_encoder_query_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
571:     # Docs encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
572:     bi_encoder_docs_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
573:     # Cross-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
574:     cross_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="mixedbread-ai/mxbai-rerank-xsmall-v1")
575:     # Config passed to the cross-encoder model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
576:     cross_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
577:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
578:     embeddings_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
579:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
580:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
581:     # Inference server API type to use for embeddings inference.
582:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_type = models.CharField(
583:         max_length=200, choices=ApiType.choices, default=ApiType.LOCAL
584:     )
585:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
586:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
587:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
588:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
589:     # The confidence threshold of the bi_encoder model to consider the embeddings as relevant
590:     bi_encoder_confidence_threshold = models.FloatField(default=0.18)
591:     # Alpha weight for hybrid search (sparse-dense), 0 = keyword only, 1 = dense only
592:     hybrid_alpha = models.FloatField(default=0.6)
593:     # Whether to enable hybrid search combining keyword and dense retrieval
594:     hybrid_enabled = models.BooleanField(default=True)

596:     def __str__(self):

600: class TextToImageModelConfig(DbBaseModel):
601:     class ModelType(models.TextChoices):
602:         OPENAI = "openai"
603:         REPLICATE = "replicate"
604:         GOOGLE = "google"
605: 
606:     model_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="dall-e-3")
607:     friendly_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
608:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.OPENAI)
609:     price_tier = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=PriceTier.choices, default=PriceTier.FREE)
610:     api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
611:     ai_model_api = models.ForeignKey(AiModelApi, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
612: 
613:     def clean(self):
614:         # Custom validation logic
615:         error = {}
616:         if self.model_type == self.ModelType.OPENAI:
617:             if self.api_key and self.ai_model_api:
618:                 error["api_key"] = (
619:                     "Both API key and AI Model API cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
620:                 )
621:                 error["ai_model_api"] = (
622:                     "Both API key and OpenAI config cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
623:                 )
624:         if self.model_type != self.ModelType.OPENAI and self.model_type != self.ModelType.GOOGLE:
625:             if not self.api_key:
626:                 error["api_key"] = "The API key field must be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
627:             if self.ai_model_api:
628:                 error["ai_model_api"] = "AI Model API cannot be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
629:         if error:
630:             raise ValidationError(error)
631: 
632:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
633:         self.clean()
634:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
635: 
636:     def __str__(self):
637:         return f"{self.model_name} - {self.model_type}"

670: class Conversation(DbBaseModel):
671:     user = models.ForeignKey(KhojUser, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
672:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
673:     client = models.ForeignKey(ClientApplication, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
674: 
675:     # Slug is an app-generated conversation identifier. Need not be unique. Used as display title essentially.
676:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
677: 
678:     # The title field is explicitly set by the user.
679:     title = models.CharField(max_length=500, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
680:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
681:     file_filters = models.JSONField(default=list)
682:     id = models.UUIDField(default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False, unique=True, primary_key=True, db_index=True)
683: 
684:     def clean(self):
685:         # Validate conversation_log structure
686:         try:
687:             messages = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
688:             for msg in messages:
689:                 ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg)
690:         except Exception as e:
691:             raise ValidationError(f"Invalid conversation_log format: {str(e)}")
692: 
693:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
694:         self.clean()
695:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
696: 
697:     @property
698:     def messages(self) -> List[ChatMessageModel]:
699:         """Type-hinted accessor for conversation messages"""
700:         validated_messages = []
701:         for msg in self.conversation_log.get("chat", []):
702:             try:
703:                 # Clean up inferred queries if they contain None
704:                 if msg.get("intent") and msg["intent"].get("inferred_queries"):
705:                     msg["intent"]["inferred-queries"] = [
706:                         q for q in msg["intent"]["inferred_queries"] if q is not None and isinstance(q, str)
707:                     ]
708:                 msg["message"] = str(msg.get("message", ""))
709:                 validated_messages.append(ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg))
710:             except ValidationError as e:
711:                 logger.warning(f"Skipping invalid message in conversation: {e}")
712:                 continue
713:         return validated_messages
714: 
715:     async def pop_message(self, interrupted: bool = False) -> Optional[ChatMessageModel]:
716:         """
717:         Remove and return the last message from the conversation log, persisting the change to the database.
718:         When interrupted is True, we only drop the last message if it was an interrupted message by khoj.
719:         """
720:         chat_log = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
721: 
722:         if not chat_log:
723:             return None
724: 
725:         last_message = chat_log[-1]
726:         is_interrupted_msg = last_message.get("by") == "khoj" and not last_message.get("message")
727:         # When handling an interruption, only pop if the last message is an empty one by khoj.
728:         if interrupted and not is_interrupted_msg:
729:             return None
730: 
731:         # Pop the last message, save the conversation, and then return the message.
732:         popped_message_dict = chat_log.pop()
733:         await self.asave()
734: 
735:         # Try to validate and return the popped message as a Pydantic model
736:         try:
737:             return ChatMessageModel.model_validate(popped_message_dict)
738:         except ValidationError as e:
739:             logger.warning(f"Popped an invalid message from conversation. The removal has been saved. Error: {e}")
740:             # The invalid message was removed and saved, but we can't return a valid model.
741:             return None
742: 
743:

746:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
747:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
748:     title = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
749:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
750: 
751: 
752: @receiver(pre_save, sender=PublicConversation)
753: def verify_public_conversation(sender, instance, **kwargs):
754:     # check if this is a new instance
755:     if instance._state.adding:
756:         base_length = 50  # Base slug length before adding random suffix
757:         base_slug = re.sub(r"\W+", "-", instance.slug.lower())[:base_length] if instance.slug else uuid.uuid4().hex
758:         suffix_length = 8  # Length of the random suffix to ensure uniqueness
759:         while True:
760:             random_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:suffix_length]
761:             slug = f"{base_slug}-{random_id}"
762:             if not PublicConversation.objects.filter(slug=slug).exists():
763:                 break
764:         instance.slug = slug
